<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
<title>Finn_Stack – Smart Solutions. Simplified Work. Faster Results.</title>
<meta name="description" content="Finn_Stack provides Excel Solutions, MIS Reporting, AI Assistance, Data Cleaning, and Business Automation. Your first solution is absolutely free. Direct contact, no data collection." />
<meta name="keywords" content="Excel Automation, MIS Reporting, AI Workflow, Bookkeeping, Data Cleaning, Business Solutions, Productivity, Finn_Stack" />
<meta property="og:title" content="Finn_Stack – Smart Solutions. Simplified Work. Faster Results." />
<meta property="og:description" content="Excel Projects • AI Assistance • Data Cleaning • Automation • Business Support. First solution absolutely free." />
<meta property="og:type" content="website" />
<!-- Cross-device compatibility -->
<meta name="robots" content="index, follow" />
<meta http-equiv="X-UA-Compatible" content="IE=edge" />
<meta name="theme-color" content="#2563EB" />
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800;900&family=Space+Grotesk:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
<style>
  *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

  :root {
    --primary: #2563EB;
    --primary-dark: #1D4ED8;
    --primary-light: #EFF6FF;
    --secondary: #06B6D4;
    --secondary-light: #ECFEFF;
    --accent: #F59E0B;
    --accent-light: #FFFBEB;
    --bg: #FFFFFF;
    --text: #0F172A;
    --text-muted: #64748B;
    --text-light: #94A3B8;
    --border: #E2E8F0;
    --surface: #F8FAFC;
    --card-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(37,99,235,0.08);
    --card-shadow-hover: 0 12px 40px rgba(37,99,235,0.18);
    --radius: 16px;
    --radius-sm: 10px;
    --radius-lg: 24px;
  }

  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; -webkit-text-size-adjust: 100%; font-size: 17px; }

  body {
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--text);
    line-height: 1.7;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
    -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
  }

  h1,h2,h3,h4,h5 { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; }
  img { max-width: 100%; display: block; }
  a { -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; }

  /* ── SCROLL PROGRESS ── */
  #scroll-progress {
    position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; height: 3px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--primary), var(--secondary), var(--accent));
    z-index: 9999; width: 0%; transition: width 0.1s linear;
  }

  /* ── NAVBAR ── */
  nav {
    position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 1000;
    padding: 0 5%; height: 70px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.88);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
    backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(226,232,240,0.6);
    transition: box-shadow 0.3s ease;
  }
  nav.scrolled { box-shadow: 0 4px 30px rgba(37,99,235,0.10); }

  .nav-logo {
    font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 800; font-size: 1.5rem;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--secondary));
    -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    background-clip: text;
    text-decoration: none; letter-spacing: -0.3px;
  }

  .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 2rem; list-style: none; }
  .nav-links a {
    text-decoration: none; color: var(--text-muted);
    font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 500;
    transition: color 0.2s; position: relative;
  }
  .nav-links a::after {
    content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: -4px; left: 0;
    width: 0; height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--primary), var(--secondary));
    transition: width 0.3s;
  }
  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--primary); }
  .nav-links a:hover::after { width: 100%; }

  .nav-cta {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--primary-dark));
    color: #fff !important; padding: 0.5rem 1.25rem;
    border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 600 !important;
    transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s !important;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(37,99,235,0.3);
  }
  .nav-cta:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(37,99,235,0.4) !important; }
  .nav-cta::after { display: none !important; }

  .hamburger {
    display: none; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px;
    cursor: pointer; background: none; border: none; padding: 6px;
    touch-action: manipulation;
  }
  .hamburger span { display: block; width: 24px; height: 2px; background: var(--text); border-radius: 2px; transition: all 0.3s; }

  .mobile-menu {
    display: none; position: fixed; top: 70px; left: 0; right: 0;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.97);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px); backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    padding: 1.5rem 5%; z-index: 999;
    flex-direction: column; gap: 0;
  }
  .mobile-menu.active { display: flex; }
  .mobile-menu a {
    color: var(--text); text-decoration: none; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500;
    padding: 0.85rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    touch-action: manipulation;
  }

  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    .nav-links { display: none; }
    .hamburger { display: flex; }
  }

  /* ── HERO ── */
  .hero {
    min-height: 100vh; padding: 120px 5% 80px;
    display: flex; align-items: center;
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .hero-bg {
    position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 0;
    background:
      radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 60% at 70% 50%, rgba(6,182,212,0.06) 0%, transparent 60%),
      radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 70% at 20% 30%, rgba(37,99,235,0.08) 0%, transparent 60%),
      radial-gradient(ellipse 40% 40% at 80% 80%, rgba(245,158,11,0.05) 0%, transparent 50%);
  }
  .hero-grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 60px;
    align-items: center; max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto;
    position: relative; z-index: 1;
  }
  .hero-badge {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
    background: var(--primary-light); color: var(--primary);
    border: 1px solid rgba(37,99,235,0.2);
    padding: 6px 16px; border-radius: 100px;
    font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    animation: fadeInUp 0.6s ease both;
  }
  .hero-badge span { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--primary); animation: pulse 2s infinite; flex-shrink: 0; }
  @keyframes pulse { 0%,100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.3; } }

  .hero-title {
    font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5.5vw, 4.2rem); font-weight: 900; line-height: 1.08;
    color: var(--text); margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    animation: fadeInUp 0.7s 0.1s ease both;
    letter-spacing: -0.5px;
  }
  .hero-title .highlight {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--secondary));
    -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text;
  }
  .hero-sub {
    font-size: 1.15rem; color: var(--text-muted); line-height: 1.9;
    max-width: 560px; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    animation: fadeInUp 0.7s 0.15s ease both;
  }

  /* Free offer strip */
  .hero-free-strip {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFFBEB, #FEF3C7);
    border: 1.5px solid rgba(245,158,11,0.4);
    border-radius: 10px; padding: 10px 18px;
    margin-bottom: 2rem;
    animation: fadeInUp 0.7s 0.2s ease both;
  }
  .hero-free-strip .strip-icon { font-size: 1.2rem; }
  .hero-free-strip .strip-text { font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 600; color: #92400E; }
  .hero-free-strip .strip-text span { color: var(--accent); }

  .hero-btns {
    display: flex; gap: 1rem; flex-wrap: wrap;
    animation: fadeInUp 0.7s 0.25s ease both;
  }
  .btn-primary {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--primary-dark));
    color: #fff; padding: 0.9rem 2rem;
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm); font-weight: 600; font-size: 1rem;
    text-decoration: none; border: none; cursor: pointer;
    transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 24px rgba(37,99,235,0.3);
    touch-action: manipulation;
  }
  .btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 10px 35px rgba(37,99,235,0.4); }
  .btn-secondary {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
    background: transparent; color: var(--primary);
    padding: 0.9rem 2rem; border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    font-weight: 600; font-size: 1rem; text-decoration: none;
    border: 1.5px solid rgba(37,99,235,0.3);
    transition: all 0.2s; cursor: pointer; touch-action: manipulation;
  }
  .btn-secondary:hover { background: var(--primary-light); border-color: var(--primary); }

  /* Hero visual / dashboard */
  .hero-visual { animation: fadeInRight 0.9s 0.2s ease both; position: relative; }
  .dashboard-card {
    background: #fff; border-radius: 20px; padding: 24px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(37,99,235,0.12);
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .dashboard-card::before {
    content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 4px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--primary), var(--secondary), var(--accent));
  }
  .dash-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 20px; }
  .dash-title { font-weight: 700; font-size: 1rem; color: var(--text); }
  .dash-badge { background: #DCFCE7; color: #15803D; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 100px; }
  .dash-stats { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3,1fr); gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; }
  .dash-stat { background: var(--surface); border-radius: 12px; padding: 14px; text-align: center; }
  .dash-stat-value { font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 700; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; }
  .dash-stat-label { font-size: 0.7rem; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 2px; }
  .dash-chart { height: 90px; display: flex; align-items: flex-end; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 16px; padding: 10px 0; }
  .dash-bar {
    flex: 1; border-radius: 6px 6px 0 0;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--primary) 0%, rgba(37,99,235,0.5) 100%);
    animation: barGrow 1.5s ease both;
  }
  @keyframes barGrow { from { transform: scaleY(0); transform-origin: bottom; } to { transform: scaleY(1); } }
  .dash-bar.cyan { background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--secondary), rgba(6,182,212,0.4)); }
  .dash-bar.amber { background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--accent), rgba(245,158,11,0.4)); }
  .dash-row { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); font-size: 0.82rem; }
  .dash-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .dash-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; margin-right: 8px; display: inline-block; }
  .float-card {
    position: absolute; background: #fff; border-radius: 14px;
    padding: 12px 16px; border: 1px solid var(--border);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(37,99,235,0.15);
    font-size: 0.82rem; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
  }
  .float-card.top { top: -24px; right: -20px; }
  .float-card.bottom { bottom: -20px; left: -20px; }
  .float-icon { width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 10px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 1.1rem; }

  /* ── SHARED SECTION ── */
  section { padding: 100px 5%; }
  .section-inner { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; }
  .section-label {
    display: inline-block;
    background: var(--primary-light); color: var(--primary);
    font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px; padding: 5px 14px; border-radius: 100px;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }
  .section-title {
    font-size: clamp(2.1rem, 4.5vw, 3.2rem);
    font-weight: 900; line-height: 1.12; margin-bottom: 1rem; color: var(--text);
  }
  .section-title .gradient-text {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--secondary));
    -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text;
  }
  .section-sub { font-size: 1.15rem; color: var(--text-muted); max-width: 640px; margin-bottom: 3.5rem; line-height: 1.85; }
  .text-center { text-align: center; }

  /* ── SERVICES ── */
  #services { background: var(--surface); }
  .services-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr)); gap: 24px; }
  .service-card {
    background: #fff; border-radius: var(--radius);
    padding: 32px; border: 1px solid var(--border);
    box-shadow: var(--card-shadow);
    transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px);
  }
  .service-card.visible { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); transition: opacity 0.5s ease, transform 0.5s ease, box-shadow 0.3s, border-color 0.3s; }
  .service-card::before {
    content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 3px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--primary), var(--secondary));
    transform: scaleX(0); transition: transform 0.3s;
  }
  .service-card:hover { transform: translateY(-6px) !important; box-shadow: var(--card-shadow-hover); }
  .service-card:hover::before { transform: scaleX(1); }
  .service-icon { width: 60px; height: 60px; border-radius: 14px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 1.6rem; margin-bottom: 1.35rem; }
  .service-name { font-size: 1.35rem; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 0.8rem; }
  .service-desc { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.75; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  .service-tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; }
  .service-tag { font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 100px; background: var(--primary-light); color: var(--primary); }

  /* ── WHY CHOOSE ── */
  #why { position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
  #why::before {
    content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(37,99,235,0.03) 0%, rgba(6,182,212,0.03) 100%);
    pointer-events: none;
  }
  .why-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 60px; align-items: center; }
  .stats-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2,1fr); gap: 16px; }
  .stat-card {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--primary-dark));
    border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 28px;
    color: #fff; text-align: center; transition: transform 0.3s;
    opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px);
  }
  .stat-card.visible { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  .stat-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); }
  .stat-card.cyan-card { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--secondary), #0891B2); }
  .stat-card.amber-card { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), #D97706); }
  .stat-card.dark-card { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0F172A, #1E293B); }
  .stat-number { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 800; line-height: 1; margin-bottom: 6px; }
  .stat-label { font-size: 0.85rem; opacity: 0.85; }
  .benefits-list { list-style: none; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; }
  .benefit-item { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 14px; }
  .benefit-check {
    width: 26px; height: 26px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--secondary));
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    color: #fff; font-size: 0.75rem; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 2px;
  }
  .benefit-text strong { display: block; font-size: 1.08rem; color: var(--text); margin-bottom: 3px; }
  .benefit-text span { font-size: 0.95rem; color: var(--text-muted); }

  /* ── PROCESS ── */
  #process { background: var(--surface); }
  .process-timeline { position: relative; }
  .process-timeline::before {
    content: ''; position: absolute; left: 36px; top: 36px; bottom: 36px; width: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--primary), var(--secondary), var(--accent), #10B981);
  }
  .process-steps { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 32px; }
  .process-step {
    display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 28px; position: relative;
    opacity: 0; transform: translateX(-20px); transition: all 0.5s ease;
  }
  .process-step.visible { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); }
  .step-number {
    width: 72px; height: 72px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 800;
    color: #fff; position: relative; z-index: 1;
  }
  .step-number.s1 { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--primary-dark)); }
  .step-number.s2 { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--secondary), #0891B2); }
  .step-number.s3 { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), #D97706); }
  .step-number.s4 { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #10B981, #059669); }
  .step-content { background: #fff; border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 24px 28px; border: 1px solid var(--border); flex: 1; }
  .step-title { font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 6px; }
  .step-desc { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1.7; }

  /* ── PORTFOLIO ── */
  #portfolio { }
  .portfolio-intro-banner {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary-light), var(--secondary-light));
    border: 1.5px dashed rgba(37,99,235,0.3);
    border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 32px 36px;
    text-align: center; margin-bottom: 48px;
  }
  .portfolio-intro-banner h3 { font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 8px; color: var(--text); }
  .portfolio-intro-banner p { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 0.95rem; line-height: 1.7; max-width: 560px; margin: 0 auto; }

  .portfolio-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr)); gap: 24px; margin-bottom: 32px; }
  .portfolio-card {
    border-radius: var(--radius); overflow: hidden;
    border: 1px solid var(--border); box-shadow: var(--card-shadow);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.96);
  }
  .portfolio-card.visible { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
  .portfolio-card:hover { transform: translateY(-6px) scale(1.01); box-shadow: var(--card-shadow-hover); }
  .portfolio-thumb {
    height: 160px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .portfolio-thumb::after {
    content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 40%, rgba(0,0,0,0.25) 100%);
  }
  .portfolio-info { background: #fff; padding: 20px 22px; }
  .portfolio-cat { font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; color: var(--primary); margin-bottom: 6px; }
  .portfolio-name { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 6px; }
  .portfolio-status {
    font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--accent);
    background: var(--accent-light); display: inline-block;
    padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 100px; margin-top: 6px;
  }
  .coming-soon-tag {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
    background: var(--accent-light); color: #92400E;
    border: 1px solid rgba(245,158,11,0.3);
    padding: 10px 22px; border-radius: 100px;
    font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 600;
  }

  /* ── ABOUT ── */
  #about { background: var(--surface); }
  .about-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 60px; align-items: center; }
  .founder-card {
    background: #fff; border-radius: var(--radius-lg); padding: 32px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border); box-shadow: var(--card-shadow);
    text-align: center; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .founder-card::before {
    content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 100px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary-light), var(--secondary-light));
  }
  .founder-avatar {
    width: 110px; height: 110px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--secondary));
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    margin: 0 auto 16px; position: relative; z-index: 1;
    border: 4px solid #fff; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(37,99,235,0.2);
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .founder-avatar svg { width: 52px; height: 52px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.9); }
  .founder-logo-img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 50%; }
  .founder-name { font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 4px; }
  .founder-role { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 0.9rem; margin-bottom: 16px; }
  .founder-socials { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 10px; }
  .social-btn {
    width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 10px; display: flex; align-items: center;
    justify-content: center; text-decoration: none;
    border: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--text-muted);
    transition: all 0.2s; touch-action: manipulation;
  }
  .social-btn:hover { background: var(--primary); color: #fff; border-color: var(--primary); }
  .social-btn svg { width: 18px; height: 18px; }
  .about-points { list-style: none; margin-top: 1.5rem; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; }
  .about-point { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-size: 1rem; color: var(--text-muted); }
  .about-point svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; color: var(--secondary); flex-shrink: 0; }

  /* ── TESTIMONIALS – replaced with "Be The First" CTA ── */
  #social-proof {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0F172A, #1E293B);
    color: #fff; text-align: center;
  }
  .proof-inner { max-width: 760px; margin: 0 auto; }
  .proof-icon {
    width: 80px; height: 80px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--secondary));
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    margin: 0 auto 24px;
  }
  .proof-icon svg { width: 36px; height: 36px; color: #fff; }
  .proof-title { font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 3.5vw, 2.4rem); font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 16px; }
  .proof-title span { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #60A5FA, #22D3EE); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; }
  .proof-sub { font-size: 1.05rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.65); line-height: 1.8; margin-bottom: 32px; }
  .proof-cards { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr)); gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 36px; }
  .proof-card {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
    border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 20px 18px;
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px); backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
    text-align: center;
  }
  .proof-card-icon { font-size: 1.8rem; margin-bottom: 8px; }
  .proof-card-title { font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 4px; }
  .proof-card-sub { font-size: 0.8rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); }
  .proof-cta-row { display: flex; gap: 12px; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .btn-white {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
    background: #fff; color: var(--primary);
    padding: 0.9rem 2rem; border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    font-weight: 700; font-size: 1rem; text-decoration: none;
    transition: all 0.2s; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
    touch-action: manipulation;
  }
  .btn-white:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(255,255,255,0.25); }
  .btn-outline-white {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
    background: transparent; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85);
    padding: 0.9rem 2rem; border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    font-weight: 600; font-size: 1rem; text-decoration: none;
    border: 1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);
    transition: all 0.2s; touch-action: manipulation;
  }
  .btn-outline-white:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); }

  /* ── CONTACT ── */
  #contact { }
  .contact-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 48px; align-items: start; }
  .contact-info h3 { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  .contact-info p { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 0.95rem; line-height: 1.8; margin-bottom: 2rem; }
  .contact-methods { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 14px; }
  .contact-method {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px;
    padding: 16px 18px; border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    border: 1px solid var(--border); background: #fff;
    text-decoration: none; color: var(--text);
    transition: all 0.2s; font-size: 0.9rem;
    touch-action: manipulation;
  }
  .contact-method:hover { border-color: var(--primary); box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(37,99,235,0.1); transform: translateX(4px); }
  .c-method-icon {
    width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 12px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .c-method-icon svg { width: 22px; height: 22px; }
  .c-method-info strong { display: block; font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 2px; }
  .c-method-info span { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 0.8rem; }

  /* Right side: direct links panel instead of form */
  .contact-direct {
    background: var(--surface); border-radius: var(--radius);
    padding: 36px; border: 1px solid var(--border);
    box-shadow: var(--card-shadow);
  }
  .contact-direct-title { font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 6px; }
  .contact-direct-sub { font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 28px; line-height: 1.7; }
  .direct-btn {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px;
    padding: 16px 20px; border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    text-decoration: none; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.95rem;
    margin-bottom: 12px; transition: all 0.25s;
    border: none; cursor: pointer; width: 100%;
    touch-action: manipulation;
  }
  .direct-btn:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }
  .direct-btn-icon { width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 10px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .direct-btn-icon svg { width: 22px; height: 22px; }
  .direct-btn-text { text-align: left; }
  .direct-btn-text strong { display: block; font-size: 0.95rem; }
  .direct-btn-text span { font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 400; }
  .direct-btn.wa { background: #F0FDF4; color: #15803D; border: 1.5px solid rgba(34,197,94,0.25); }
  .direct-btn.wa:hover { background: #DCFCE7; border-color: rgba(34,197,94,0.5); transform: translateX(4px); box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(34,197,94,0.15); }
  .direct-btn.wa .direct-btn-icon { background: #22C55E; color: #fff; }
  .direct-btn.mail { background: var(--primary-light); color: var(--primary-dark); border: 1.5px solid rgba(37,99,235,0.2); }
  .direct-btn.mail:hover { background: #DBEAFE; border-color: rgba(37,99,235,0.4); transform: translateX(4px); box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(37,99,235,0.12); }
  .direct-btn.mail .direct-btn-icon { background: var(--primary); color: #fff; }
  .direct-btn.call { background: var(--accent-light); color: #92400E; border: 1.5px solid rgba(245,158,11,0.25); }
  .direct-btn.call:hover { background: #FEF3C7; border-color: rgba(245,158,11,0.5); transform: translateX(4px); box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(245,158,11,0.15); }
  .direct-btn.call .direct-btn-icon { background: var(--accent); color: #fff; }
  .direct-btn.insta { background: #FFF1F2; color: #9D174D; border: 1.5px solid rgba(236,72,153,0.2); }
  .direct-btn.insta:hover { background: #FCE7F3; border-color: rgba(236,72,153,0.4); transform: translateX(4px); box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(236,72,153,0.12); }
  .direct-btn.insta .direct-btn-icon { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #F97316, #EC4899, #8B5CF6); color: #fff; }
  .privacy-note {
    margin-top: 20px; padding: 12px 16px;
    background: #F0FDF4; border-radius: 8px;
    border-left: 3px solid #22C55E;
    font-size: 0.8rem; color: #166534; display: flex; gap: 8px; align-items: flex-start;
  }
  .privacy-note svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 1px; }

  /* ── FOOTER ── */
  footer { background: #0F172A; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); padding: 64px 5% 32px; }
  .footer-grid {
    max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto;
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 40px; margin-bottom: 48px;
  }
  .footer-logo {
    font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 1.6rem; font-weight: 800;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #60A5FA, #22D3EE);
    -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text;
    margin-bottom: 12px; display: block;
  }
  .footer-brand p { font-size: 0.88rem; line-height: 1.8; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); max-width: 240px; }
  .footer-social { display: flex; gap: 10px; margin-top: 20px; }
  .footer-social-link {
    width: 38px; height: 38px; border-radius: 10px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    text-decoration: none; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7);
    transition: all 0.2s; touch-action: manipulation;
  }
  .footer-social-link svg { width: 17px; height: 17px; }
  .footer-social-link:hover { background: var(--primary); border-color: var(--primary); color: #fff; }
  .footer-col h4 { font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; margin-bottom: 16px; }
  .footer-links { list-style: none; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; }
  .footer-links a { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.88rem; transition: color 0.2s; }
  .footer-links a:hover { color: #60A5FA; }
  .footer-bottom {
    max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto;
    padding-top: 24px; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
    font-size: 0.82rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35); flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 12px;
  }

  /* ── FLOATING WHATSAPP ── */
  .wa-float {
    position: fixed; bottom: 28px; right: 28px; z-index: 1000;
    width: 60px; height: 60px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: #25D366; color: #fff;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    text-decoration: none;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 28px rgba(37,211,102,0.5);
    transition: transform 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s;
    animation: waEntrance 0.8s 1s ease both;
    touch-action: manipulation;
  }
  .wa-float svg { width: 28px; height: 28px; }
  .wa-float:hover { transform: scale(1.1) rotate(8deg); box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(37,211,102,0.7); }
  @keyframes waEntrance { from { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.3) rotate(-30deg); } to { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1) rotate(0); } }
  .wa-tooltip {
    position: absolute; right: 70px; background: #0F172A; color: #fff;
    font-size: 0.78rem; white-space: nowrap; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 8px;
    opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; transition: opacity 0.2s; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
  }
  .wa-float:hover .wa-tooltip { opacity: 1; }

  /* ── ANIMATIONS ── */
  @keyframes fadeInUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(40px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }
  @keyframes fadeInRight { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(40px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); } }

  /* Marquee trust bar */
  .trust-bar { background: var(--primary-light); padding: 14px 5%; overflow: hidden; }
  .trust-track { display: flex; gap: 48px; white-space: nowrap; animation: marquee 22s linear infinite; }
  .trust-item { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--primary); }
  @keyframes marquee { from { transform: translateX(0); } to { transform: translateX(-50%); } }

  /* ── RESPONSIVE ── */
  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    .hero-grid, .why-grid, .about-grid, .contact-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    .hero-visual { order: -1; }
  }
  @media (max-width: 640px) {
    section { padding: 70px 4%; }
    .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .stats-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2,1fr); }
    .dashboard-card { transform: scale(0.88); transform-origin: top center; }
    .process-timeline::before { left: 28px; }
    .step-number { width: 56px; height: 56px; font-size: 1.2rem; }
    .proof-cards { grid-template-columns: repeat(2,1fr); }
  }

  /* ── LOGO IMAGE ── */
  .nav-logo-img {
    height: 40px; width: 40px; border-radius: 50%;
    object-fit: cover;
    border: 2px solid rgba(37,99,235,0.25);
    box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(6,182,212,0.3);
    flex-shrink: 0;
    transition: box-shadow 0.3s;
  }
  .nav-logo-img:hover { box-shadow: 0 0 18px rgba(6,182,212,0.55); }
  .nav-logo-wrap { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; text-decoration: none; }
  .hero-logo-container {
    display: flex; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 28px;
    animation: fadeInUp 0.6s ease both;
  }
  .hero-logo-img {
    width: 120px; height: 120px; border-radius: 50%;
    object-fit: cover;
    border: 3px solid rgba(6,182,212,0.4);
    box-shadow: 0 0 32px rgba(6,182,212,0.35), 0 8px 32px rgba(37,99,235,0.2);
  }
  /* LinkedIn button style */
  .direct-btn.linkedin { background: #EFF6FF; color: #1D4ED8; border: 1.5px solid rgba(37,99,235,0.2); }
  .direct-btn.linkedin:hover { background: #DBEAFE; border-color: rgba(37,99,235,0.45); transform: translateX(4px); box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(37,99,235,0.15); }
  .direct-btn.linkedin .direct-btn-icon { background: #0A66C2; color: #fff; }

</style>
</head>

            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#2563EB" stroke-width="2" style="width:20px;height:20px;"><path d="M12 22s8-4 8-10V5l-8-3-8 3v7c0 6 8 10 8 10z"/></svg>
          </div>
          <div>
            <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:0.88rem;color:#0F172A;">Privacy First</div>

          </div>

          </div>

<!-- ── SERVICES ── -->
<section id="services">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="text-center" style="margin-bottom:3.5rem;">
      <span class="section-label">Our Services</span>
      <h2 class="section-title">Everything You Need to <span class="gradient-text">Work Smarter</span></h2>
      <p class="section-sub" style="margin:0 auto;">From data tools to AI automation&mdash;Finn_Stack covers every layer of your productivity stack. All fully customized. All yours.</p>

<script>
// Scroll progress
window.addEventListener('scroll', function() {
  var scrolled = (window.scrollY / (document.documentElement.scrollHeight - window.innerHeight)) * 100;
  document.getElementById('scroll-progress').style.width = scrolled + '%';
  var nav = document.getElementById('navbar');
  if (window.scrollY > 50) { nav.classList.add('scrolled'); } else { nav.classList.remove('scrolled'); }
}, { passive: true });

// Hamburger menu
var hamburger = document.getElementById('hamburger');
var mobileMenu = document.getElementById('mobileMenu');
hamburger.addEventListener('click', function() {
  mobileMenu.classList.toggle('active');
});
function closeMobile() { mobileMenu.classList.remove('active'); }

// Close mobile menu on outside click
document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
  if (!hamburger.contains(e.target) && !mobileMenu.contains(e.target)) {
    mobileMenu.classList.remove('active');
  }
});

// Intersection observer for scroll animations
var animObserver = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {
  entries.forEach(function(entry) {
    if (entry.isIntersecting) {
      var el = entry.target;
      var delay = parseInt(el.dataset.delay) || 0;
      setTimeout(function() {
        el.classList.add('visible');
      }, delay);
      animObserver.unobserve(el);
    }
  });
}, { threshold: 0.15, rootMargin: '0px 0px -40px 0px' });

document.querySelectorAll('[data-animate]').forEach(function(el, i) {
  el.dataset.delay = (i % 6) * 100;
  animObserver.observe(el);
});

// Respect reduced motion preference
if (window.matchMedia && window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches) {
  document.querySelectorAll('[data-animate]').forEach(function(el) { el.classList.add('visible'); });
}
</script>
